name: Shrimp'n' Chicken Gumbo
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine chicken and water in a Dutch oven; bring to a boil.
2. Reduce heat, and simmer, uncovered, for 45 minutes or until chicken is done.
3. Remove chicken from broth; set aside to cool.
4. Strain broth, if desired, and transfer to a large container; set aside.
5. Bone and chop chicken; set aside.
6. Place flour in a 15x10x1-inch jellyroll pan. Bake at 350 degrees for 45 minutes to 1 hour or until very brown, stirring every 15 minutes. Set aside.
7. Cook onion and next 4 ingredients in oil in Dutch oven over medium-high heat, stirring constantly, until tender.
8. Add browned flour, thyme, and next 3 ingredients, stirring until smooth.
9. Add reserved broth, chicken, canned broth, tomato paste, and sausage. Bring to a boil; reduce heat, and simmer, uncovered, for 1 hour.
10. Peel and devein shrimp; add to broth mixture. Cover and simmer for 10 minutes or until shrimp turn pink.
11. Remove and discard bay leaves. Serve over rice. Yield: 4 1/2 quarts.
